Title: Luna
Creator: Jamison Stone
Description: Luna was adopted in November 2020. She is originally from Oklahoma with her being born July 2020. Luna has been quite the follower, always needing her brothers to do anything that requires confidence. She was chosen due to her impact she has on people in the family (especially her favorite mom) whether some of those impacts are positive or negative.

Title: Roger Stone Memorial Sign
Creator: Jamison Stone
Description: This was a sign painted after the death of Roger Stone referred to by family members as “Papa.” It shows his birth and death date with the three cars he worked on throughout his life. This was picked as he was an extremely influential person and gave Chad his love for cars.

Title: Iowa Gold Star Military Museum Challenge Coin
Creator: Jamison Stone
Description: This challenge coin was given at the end of Jamison’s first internship. This museum was extremely influential in Jamison’s career and teaching the basics and advanced lessons in a real environment. During school breaks, Jamison still goes back to volunteer and helps assist with tasks around the museum.

Title: Scout
Creator: Jamison Stone
Description: Scout was adopted in 2013 and has been with the family ever since. He lost his right eye due to a tumor, but has since fully recovered and is able to see with only his left eye. He has left quite the impression on the family as he used to be extremely wild, but has calmed down immensely ever since Boon was adopted.

Title: Boon
Creator: Jamison Stone
Description: Boon was adopted at a very young age in 2018. Originally brought in as a foster dog he melted everyone's hearts by being an extremely calm and smart dog. When the adoption papers were signed he let his true colors show as he showed himself to be a much more wilder, and extremely vocal dog. The family still loves him the same.

Title: Blue Rose
Creator: Jamison Stone
Description: This was a flower Jamison was given by his director for his final high school concert. As the flower was not put in a vase, Addison took ownership of the flower and dried it out to prevent it from being thrown away. The flower is dyed to have the school's colors, blue and white.

Title: Rocket
Creator: Jamison Stone
Description: Rocket the snail was adopted in 2026 to help with part of cleaning Panther's tank. Rocket is very shy and typically only moves when not being looked at by anything. He serves a very important role in helping keep Panther's tank cleaner for the both of them.

Title: Panther
Creator: Jamison Stone
Description: Panther was Addison's first ever betta fish, and has been around since 2023. Addison discovered part of her love for marine biology through taking care of Panther, and has left him in Des Moines while she is at school. The fish still remains an integral part of the family with a regular schedule and checkups from various family members including the dogs.

Title: Wedding Quilt
Creator: Jamison Stone
Description: This quilt was made by Reta Stone, known to the family as nana, for Carmily and Chad's wedding. It displays her skill in quilting as she enjoys creating various designs for the family members with quilts.

Title: Megalodon Tooth
Creator: Jamison Stone
Description: A real megalodon tooth which was given as a gift to Chad Stone. This tooth symbolizes a constant debate between both Chad and Addison on whether Megalodon's still exist after seeing them in movies. Chad still believes they are out there somewhere, whereas Addison believes they have gone extinct

Title: Music Quilt
Creator: Chad Stone
Description: This quilt was made by Reta Stone, known to the family as nana, for Jamison's high school graduation. Another quilt she put together for a special event in someone else's life, that is adorned with music notes for Jamison's love of music.

Title: Notebook with Letters from Deployment
Creator: Carmily Stone
Description: This notebook contains letters written from Chad Stone to his wife Carmily Stone during his first deployment. All of these entries were kept in a journal that were then given after returning from deployment, with various writings about the day, week, etc. all eventually to be handed back to a family member.

Title: Raggedy Ann Music Box
Creator: Carmily Stone
Description: This music box depicts the fictional Raggedy Ann. Given to Carmily Stone by her great grandparents in 1977, she has held onto it ever since. On the bottom reads a message for Carmily with the birthdates of her great grandma, Eva, 1919, and her great grandpa, Guido, 1921.

Title: Snickers
Creator: Jamison Stone
Description: Snickers was adopted after her previous owner died and her family was unable to take care of her. Through a family friend, they introduced the family to her and she was adopted the same day where she stayed with the family until her passing in 2019.

Title: Duke
Creator: Jamison Stone
Description: Duke was adopted in 2012 and passed away in 2020. He was adopted when he was older due to the other dog in the house not liking younger dogs. He immediatly clicked with the other dog due to his gentle nature. He was a careful dog around both Jamison and Addison and refused to ever play with either of them for fear of hurting them, but still assisted with their, or sometimes his, various escapades. Pictured here in Easter 2017 sitting on the front steps to the house.
